text: When was the last time your strong accent saved you? Andrea Rozenberg got an urgent message from 'me' asking for a quick call. A video call came in, and on the other end was a deepfaked video of me talking to her.
KYB is broken. Veriff acquired global KYB company Vespia to fix it.
The 'Gartner Tax' is dead. People used to tell me: It's a tax you pay to exist.
In 2025 we tripled volumes, doubled revenue all while being $100M+ in revenue and growing profitably.
My father's iPhone and my face was all that was required to open his iPhone. Clear example how iPhone's Face ID is just a UX feature, not fit for identity verification.
